name: Newberry High Desert Truck Stop (Mobil / Circle K)
description: Independent 24-hour truck stop at I-40 Exit 23 in Newberry Springs with diesel, showers, a convenience store and a truck service bay.

name: Kelly's Market & Truck Stop (Shell)
description: 24-hour independent truck stop in the SE quadrant of I-40 Exit 18 (National Trails Hwy/Route 66) with diesel, a market, deli and a Subway.

name: Desert Oasis Rest Area (I-40)
description: Caltrans rest area near I-40 mile marker 28 east of Newberry Springs with separate eastbound and westbound sides offering lighted overnight truck parking and restrooms.

name: CHP Weigh Station / Commercial Vehicle Enforcement Facility (I-40)
description: California Highway Patrol commercial-vehicle weigh/inspection facility on I-40 in the Nebo/Daggett area east of the I-40/I-15 junction.

name: Barstow Fuel (76 / Phillips 66)
description: 24-hour independent fuel station on E Main Street near the I-40/I-15 junction (about a half mile from I-40 Exit 1) offering diesel, a convenience store and auto/repair service.
